title: Kwik Stop Manager · the first sim
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: A season managed
entries.blurb: Inventory, cash flow, the patience meter, Olaf. The first manager sim Oneironautics shipped, and the reason every later one feels like this one.

entries.title: The DNA, again
entries.blurb: Estuary 3's Manager Mode is this cartridge wearing a different vest. Now you've seen the original, the homage reads differently.

entries.title: Olaf's taste, confirmed
entries.blurb: Olaf buys the same thing every visit and the game tracks whether you keep it stocked. His taste is terrible. His loyalty is absolute.

entries.title: THE CREW'S STORE
entries.blurb: You built the crew that could run it without you. Sam's Summer Shifts opens on the title this ending earns.

entries.title: THE NEW LETTERS
entries.blurb: Corporate bought in. New sign, new letters, same cooler hum underneath. A win, technically.

entries.title: SHUTTERED FOR THE SEASON
entries.blurb: The store closed. The ending is quieter than losing usually feels, which is its own kind of statement.
